description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in MaxWebPortal 1.3.5 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) fpassword parameter to inc_functions.asp, (2) txtAddress, (3) message, or (4) subject parameter to post_info.asp, (5) andor parameter to search.asp, (6) verkey parameter to pop_profile.asp, or (7) Remove or (8) Delete parameter to pm_delete2.asp.
